text.title: Auto-Draft Postmortem, No Auto-Publish Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of inc-postmortem-auto-draft-no-publish. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent publishes draft directly to public blog; PR/marketing surprised.
antipattern.fix: Hard contract: published=false until human sets true.

antipattern.symptom: Draft cites `https://dash/checkout-errors` but the URL 404s; reader trust collapses.
antipattern.fix: Evidence link MUST be HEAD-checked before emission; failed checks strip claim.

antipattern.symptom: Agent rewrites 'Sam failed to escalate' to 'escalation did not occur'; contributors feel sanitised.
